candidates.snippet: has been used in several printed projects, from branding to magazines. Available in five weights from Light to Bold, in 2022 this robust and balanced typeface was completed with the addition of matching italics. Designer

ita, Teso, Turkish, Upper Sorbian, Uzbek (Latin), Volapük, Vunjo, Walser, Welsh, Western Frisian, Zulu Production years 2009-2022 Styles Light, Light Italic, Book, Book Italic, Regular, Regular Italic, Medium, Medium Ita
